sigma_v_zero.description: Annihilation cross-section ⟨σv⟩ at v→0 (cm³/s). The v→0 limit is the indirect-detection observable. Producers emitting at v=v_freezeout (e.g. MadDM's `sigmav_total`) MUST convert to v→0 before writing this field, OR set it to null and document the v in `notes`. micrOMEGAs emits at v→0 natively (see micromegas/SKILL.md line 217). The schema does not enforce v=0; this is producer discipline.

channel_fractions.description: Per-channel branching fractions of total ⟨σv⟩(v→0). Channel keys (e.g. 'bb','ww','zh') are model-dependent — no required keys. Sum-to-one is producer discipline (JSON Schema cannot easily enforce).

source.description: DRAKE excluded — DRAKE returns Ωh² only in v1.
